nasb.text: for the half-tribe of Manasseh in Gilead, Iddo the son of Zechariah; for Benjamin, Jaasiel the son of Abner;

esv.text: for the half-tribe of Manasseh in Gilead, Iddo the son of Zechariah; for Benjamin, Jaasiel the son of Abner;

cnv.text: 基列地瑪拿西那半個支派的首領是撒迦利亞的兒子易多；便雅憫支派的首領是押尼珥的兒子雅西業；

ccb.text: 基列的玛拿西另半个支派的首领是撒迦利亚的儿子易多；便雅悯支派的首领是押尼珥的儿子雅西业；
